summary: Exit-side breakeven variant with high-liquidity filter; no integrity issues identified, standard advisory monitoring only.

risk_assessments.leakage_notes: novel_dim is liquidity_bucket=high (a static/contemporaneous regime tag, not post-T0); 30s activation timer is forward-running from T0, which is causal not leaky. No forward_*, confirm_after_*, or post_event_* fields present.
risk_assessments.live_conflict_notes: Exit-side archetype with NA channel/side does not generate entry positions and cannot conflict with the live BWE_OI_Price_monitor pump long strategy.
risk_assessments.remediation: None required. Advisory: confirm the 30s breakeven activation clock is computed from T0 forward (not retroactively) at implementation time, and that liquidity_bucket=high is bucketed using only data available at or before T0.
